---
title: "fanel:  Filters for Panel Data"
author: "Russell G. Almond"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Partially Observed Markov Decision Processes and Panel Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r, notice=FALSE}
library(fanel)
library(tidyverse)
```

# POMDP Model Framework

## Basic Diagram

## Filters

## Covariates

# Temporal Data

## Panmat

## Panel_Frame

## Panel_Data

## Quadrature

## Longform Data

# POMDP Models

## Basic Model Classes

### PopulationModel

### EvidenceModel

### GrowthModel

### Transition Model

## Model Containers

### Population

### Evidence

### Activities

### ActivitiesD

### POMDP

# The Filters

## Simulating Data from a Model

## Simple Likelihood Filters

## Particle Filter

## Baum-Welch Filter

# Parameter Estimation

## EM Algorithm

## E-Step

## M-Step
